Package com.shaft.tools.io.internal

package com.shaft.tools.io.internal
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.shaft.tools.io
     
  • Class
    Description
    AllureManager
    Internal utility class that manages the Allure reporting lifecycle for SHAFT test runs.
    ApiPerformanceExecutionReport
    Utility class for generating HTML-based API performance execution reports.
    AssertionEvidenceReporter
    Renders a self-contained HTML "assertion evidence" card for a single Assert/Verify validation, redacting secrets and diffing expected/actual values, so Allure attachments can show exactly what a validation compared without leaking sensitive data or exceeding a bounded size.
    AttachmentReporter
    Internal utility class responsible for attaching test artifacts (screenshots, recordings, GIFs, data files, page snapshots, etc.) to the Allure report and optionally to ReportPortal.
    BrowserObservabilityRecorder
    Thread-local browser network, console, and capability metadata recorder for SHAFT trace artifacts.
    BrowserObservabilityRecorder.NetworkExchange
    Active network exchange handle.
    BrowserObservabilityRecorder.NetworkObservation
    Browser network exchange details recorded into the trace.
    BrowserObservabilityRecorder.NetworkSnapshotEntry
    Read-only snapshot of one observed network transaction, safe to hand to a caller outside this class (unlike BrowserObservabilityRecorder.NetworkEvent, which stays private since it backs the mutable trace list).
    BrowserPerformanceExecutionReport
    Aggregates Playwright browser action and page-load timings into performance budget reports.
    CheckpointCounter
    Aggregates validation checkpoints and attaches a summarized HTML report to Allure.
    CheckpointStatus
    Represents the execution result of a recorded checkpoint.
    CheckpointType
    Represents the category of a recorded checkpoint.
    ExecutionSummaryReport
     
    ExecutionSummaryReport.Status
     
    ExecutionSummaryReport.StatusIcon
     
    FailureBriefReporter
    Builds the human-first failed-test brief and machine-readable attachment manifest.
    FailureDiagnosticsReporter
    Builds the agent-readable failure diagnostics bundle attached to failed tests.
    FailureReporter
     
    FailureTraceReporter
    Builds the failure-scoped SHAFT trace viewer artifacts attached to Allure.
    FlakeProfiler
    Collects opt-in action timing, wait, retry, locator, healing, and evidence-cost signals.
    FlakeProfiler.ActionSample
     
    HttpContractRecorder
    Thread-local HTTP contract recorder, validator, and browser replay rule factory.
    HttpContractRecorder.Contract
     
    HttpContractRecorder.Interaction
     
    HttpContractRecorder.Message
     
    IssueReporter
     
    LogRedirector
     
    MobileTraceMetadata
    Collects mobile and mobile-emulation metadata for SHAFT trace events.
    ProgressBarLogger
    Logs a lightweight terminal progress bar for long-running synchronous operations.
    ProjectStructureManager
    Initializes runtime project folders and service provider metadata files.
    ProjectStructureManager.RunType
    Supported runtime execution modes used for listener bootstrapping.
    ReportContext
    Runner-neutral per-thread report context and log buffer.
    ReportContext.AttachmentRecord
    Machine-readable SHAFT attachment metadata for one test thread.
    ReportHelper
    Provides report-level helper operations for attaching execution artifacts.
    ReportManagerHelper
     
    TraceEventRecorder
    Thread-local Selenium trace event recorder used by failure trace artifacts.
    TraceEventRecorder.Event
    Active action event handle.
